title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to Welding. Understand the welding and classification of welding
process, development and science in welding, gas welding. Fuel gases, GMAW
process, different metal transfers, power source, electrodes, shielding gas, uses
of gas in metal arc welding, Different types of oxy-acetylene flames,  Fore hand
and back hand welding techniques. Function of fillers and fluxes, Arc welding.
Various arc welding processes. Carbon arc welding, Shielded metal arc,
submerged arc, TIG, MIG, Electro slag, Electro gas, Plasma arc, arc spot
welding, stud welding

title: Module 2
content:
Resistance welding - welding arrangement, weld cycle, different types of
resistance welding – spot welding, seam welding, projection welding, resistance
upset welding, flash butt, percussion welding, tube welding, high frequency
welding, solid state welding - principle and welding arrangements, advantages/
disadvantages, different types of solid state welding – cold welding, diffusion
welding, ultrasonic welding, explosive, friction and inertia welding, forging,
principle and welding arrangements. advantages/ disadvantages, different types
of thermochemical welding – thermit welding, atomic hydrogen welding,

title: Module 3
content:
Radiant energy welding - principle and welding arrangements, advantages/
disadvantages, different types of radiant energy welding – Electron beam
welding, laser beam welding, Under water welding.  Principle and welding
arrangements. Advantages/ disadvantages. Specific aspects pertaining to
underwater welding. Precautions to be taken. Wet welding, Dry welding, Hyper
baric welding, cavity welding, Robotic Welding. Define the Introduction of
Robotic welding, Application of Robotic Welding in Ship Production, Robotic
Welding System, and Types of Welding Robots, Brazing and soldering.
Difference between brazing, soldering and welding, adhesives and bonding
methods.

title: Module 4
content:
Weld Defects and measures for their control. Distortion control. Tests-
destructive/ non-destructive, Welding standards, welding performance and
procedure qualification, Performance Qualification of Welders & Operators, Test
Reports, Acceptance Standards, Quality Assurance and Audit, Consumable
Classification & Coding. Essential and non-essential variables. Effects of
variables, Crystallization of a Pure Metal, Phase Transformation in Iron-Carbon
Diagram
